product_overview: RealmxAI is a web platform that lets users link a crypto wallet and Google account to participate in privacy-preserving Bitcoin node sessions, earn points, and manage referrals via a real-time dashboard. The product emphasises minimal data collection, clear privacy messaging and secure dual authentication before enabling mining sessions.
core_goals: Provide a simple SPA entry point to participate in privacy-preserving Bitcoin node sessions with dual authentication (wallet + Google).
Minimise and protect user data; encrypt traffic (TLS), validate inputs, and store sensitive fields securely.
Offer a real-time dashboard with live session, points and referral updates via secure WebSockets.
Implement a referral program that generates unique codes, credits rewards, and prevents duplicate or abusive sign-ups.
Provide an admin panel with role-based access to monitor sessions, users, referrals and to act on suspicious activity.

features.name: Google Login
features.description: Allow users to link a Google account via OAuth to associate an identity with their profile; this is required (alongside a connected wallet) to activate mining sessions.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Hover Profile button -> Click 'Link Google Account' button -> Complete Google OAuth consent in popup -> Return to app -> See 'Google account linked' confirmation

Navigate to / -> Hover Profile button -> Click 'Link Google Account' button -> Google OAuth popup fails or user cancels -> Return to app -> See error message 'Unable to link Google account; please try again'

features.name: Wallet Connect (RainbowKit + SIWE)
features.description: Let users connect a Web3 wallet using RainbowKit and prove ownership by signing a SIWE message; the server verifies the signature before considering the wallet verified.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Hover Profile button -> Click 'Connect Wallet' button -> Select Wallet provider in wallet picker -> Sign SIWE message in Wallet popup -> See connected wallet address and verification success

Navigate to / -> Hover Profile button -> Click 'Connect Wallet' button -> Select Wallet provider in wallet picker -> Decline to sign SIWE message in Wallet popup -> See error message 'Wallet connection failed: signature required'

features.name: Activate Mining (Dual Authentication requirement)
features.description: Start a mining session only after the user has both a linked Google account and a verified connected wallet; sessions award points in real time.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click 'Start Mining' button -> System checks for linked Google account and connected wallet -> Both auths present -> Mining session starts and timer displays

Navigate to / -> Click 'Start Mining' button -> System checks for linked Google account and connected wallet -> Missing Google link -> Show prompt 'Please link Google account to start mining' -> Provide button to open Google link flow

features.name: Real-time Dashboard (Socket.IO)
features.description: Present live session metrics (online users, active sessions, session duration, points, referrals) over secure WebSockets with token-based handshake and rate/size limits.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Dashboard loads -> Client establishes secure WebSocket (wss) connection -> See live metrics (users online, session duration, points) update in real time
Navigate to / -> Dashboard loads -> WebSocket handshake fails due to invalid token or origin -> See error banner 'Live updates unavailable; reconnecting' and fallback to periodic polling

features.name: Referral Program
features.description: Generate and share unique referral codes at signup; apply valid referral codes during registration and credit referrers while preventing duplicate or abusive referrals.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open Profile/Referrals section -> Click 'Generate Referral Code' -> See unique referral code displayed and 'Copy' button
Navigate to / -> During signup, enter referral code -> Server validates code -> Code valid and not abused -> New account created -> Referrer credited with reward points

Navigate to / -> During signup, enter referral code -> Server detects duplicate registration or abused code -> See error 'Referral code invalid or already used' and continue signup without referral credit

features.name: Admin Panel & Role-based Access
features.description: Provide an internal admin interface (AdminJS) to view and manage Users, Sessions, Referrals and Rewards, enforcing role-based access and multi-factor authentication for admin actions.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Click 'Admin' link -> Enter admin credentials -> Complete admin 2FA (OTP) -> See admin dashboard with Users, Sessions and Referrals lists
Navigate to / -> Click 'Admin' link -> Enter non-admin or invalid credentials -> See 'Access denied' message and no admin data shown

features.name: Wallet Connect
features.description: Connect Web3 Wallet using RainbowKit and SIWE
user_interactions: Sign SIWE message in Wallet popup
